violations.message: campaign.store_phone_tel "+1-800-555-1234" must be a tel: URI (e.g. "tel:+18005551234"); without the scheme it renders a broken link in <a href> attributes.
campaign.allowed_domains[0] must be a non-empty hostname string; got "".
campaign.allowed_domains[2] must be a non-empty hostname string; got 42.
